name: Ubuntu Desktop VNC
postStartCommand: vncserver -kill :1 2>/dev/null; rm -f /tmp/.X11-unix/X1; vncserver :1 -geometry 1280x800 -depth 24 -SecurityTypes None -xstartup /usr/bin/startxfce4 && DISPLAY=:1 chromium --no-sandbox --disable-gpu --disable-dev-shm-usage --no-first-run & websockify --web /usr/share/novnc 6080 localhost:5901
